installCommand: if [ -f apps/frontend/package.json ]; then cd apps/frontend; fi && npm install --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --package-lock=false
buildCommand: if [ -f apps/frontend/package.json ]; then cd apps/frontend; fi && npm run build
devCommand: if [ -f apps/frontend/package.json ]; then cd apps/frontend; fi && npm run dev
